final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing UI design system for a tech dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: classic minimalist tech UI design system, clean vector-based components, flat design with subtle depth, Swiss-style grid precision, Apple Human Interface Guidelines meets Material Design
Composition: modular component library layout, organized grid system showing dashboard layout, mobile screen mockup, card components, button states, and control variants side by side
Subject: comprehensive UI component set including navigation bars, data cards with metrics, primary/secondary/ghost buttons, toggle switches, sliders, input fields, progress indicators, and notification badges
Scene/backdrop: neutral light gray canvas background with subtle grid overlay, ample white space between components
Lighting/mood: even ambient lighting, no harsh shadows, professional and approachable
Color palette: cool slate gray as base, electric blue as primary action color, soft white for surfaces, subtle gradient accents for depth
Materials/textures: matte surfaces with 1px subtle borders, soft drop shadows (0-4px), smooth rounded corners (8-16px radius)
Constraints: must maintain visual consistency across all components; scalable to 16x16 icons; accessible contrast ratios
Avoid: skeuomorphic textures; glassmorphism unless subtle; neon glow overload; inconsistent corner radii; 8K stuffer words
